entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Primary stressor identified as increasing farmer vulnerability

entities.name: BIOPHYSICAL CIRCUMSTANCES
entities.description: Unfavorable environmental conditions affecting farm management and production

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC DOMAIN
entities.description: Area encompassing labor dynamics and price volatility that affects production

entities.name: LABOR DYNAMICS
entities.description: Disturbances in the socioeconomic domain affecting farm management

entities.name: PRICE VOLATILITY
entities.description: Disturbances in the socioeconomic domain affecting farm management

entities.name: FARM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of organizing and operating a farm

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The agricultural output of the farming system

entities.name: ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Essential responses to disturbances to evolve toward a better state

entities.name: ANTIFRAGILITY
entities.description: Characteristic of complex systems where disturbances trigger reorganization and improvement

entities.name: COMPLEX SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems where adaptations and volatility are inherent characteristics

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The state of being susceptible to stressors and disturbances

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMS
entities.description: Small-scale agricultural operations assessed for vulnerability and antifragility

entities.name: BIHAR
entities.description: State in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where the study was conducted

entities.name: ACCUMULATION OF STOCKS
entities.description: Criterion for antifragility involving the buildup of resources

entities.name: CREATION OF OPTIONALITY
entities.description: Criterion for antifragility involving having multiple options for innovation

entities.name: FARMER AUTONOMY
entities.description: Criterion for antifragility involving the independence and self-governance of farmers

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: Qualitative research method used to gather data from 92 farmers

entities.name: ADAPTIVE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of farmers to change their situation in response to challenges

entities.name: STRATEGIC PLANNING
entities.description: Long-term objective-driven planning for farm improvement

entities.name: GOVERNMENTAL SUPPORT
entities.description: External aid provided by the government to improve livelihoods

entities.name: POSITIVE DEVIANT FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers who demonstrate higher antifragility despite facing similar challenges

entities.name: DIVERSE FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Farming systems characterized by variety, abundance in stocks, and optionality

entities.name: COMPETENCE
entities.description: The skill and ability of farmers to manage their systems

entities.name: CONNECTEDNESS
entities.description: The relationship of farmers to peers, the community, and markets

entities.name: POLICY LEVEL
entities.description: The level at which governmental and regulatory adaptations occur

entities.name: BOTTOM-UP ADAPTATION AND INNOVATION REGIME
entities.description: An approach to innovation where initiative and cooperation are encouraged from the ground up

entities.name: INTRINSIC MOTIVATION
entities.description: Internal drive of farmers that enables transitions at the farm level
